texto: What the mysterious is I do not know. I do not call it God because God has come to mean much that I do not believe in. Any idea of a personal God seems very odd to me.

texto: It is science alone that can solve the problems of hunger and poverty, of insanitation and illiteracy, of superstition and deadening custom and tradition, of vast resources running to waste, or a rich country inhabited by starving people... frase_original: A moment comes, which comes but rarely in history, when we step out from the old to the new; when an age ends; and when the soul of a nation long suppressed finds utterance.
